headline: Corgi Loaf Baking Co.: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Corgi Loaf Baking Co. carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 80.86, led by Justin Jefferson, Kyle Pitts, and Malik Nabers. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Jakobi Meyers at 65.6 C-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Justin Jefferson (97.3), Kyle Pitts (94.2), and Malik Nabers (84.5).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Jakobi Meyers is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 65.6. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 14 offensive players, with 6 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 74.85.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 14 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
